summary: Verified three P0 bug fixes in Balance Sheet for iteration 93. All three bugs are FIXED and working correctly. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All calculations verified via screenshots.
critical_code_review_comments: Bug Fix 1 (Truck calculation): backend/routes/fy_summary.py line 431 now uses (qntl - bag/100) * rate, matching entry creation formula in main.js line 272
Bug Fix 2 (Diesel orphan pump): Lines 223-240 in fy_summary.py handle diesel accounts when pump_id not in diesel_pumps collection
Bug Fix 3 (cutting_rate=0): Lines 86, 106 in desktop-app/routes/entries.js use nullish check (cutting_rate != null ? cutting_rate : 5) instead of falsy check
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: kms_year=2025-2026, Gokul mandi (cutting_rate=0), Barsana (cutting_rate=10), truck OD15A1234
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three Balance Sheet bugs confirmed fixed. Truck OD15A1234: total=15904, paid=15904, balance=0 (was -1121.28 before fix). Gokul agent: total=4000 (with cutting_rate=0, not 4100). Diesel Lokesh Fuels: shows 4400 in Sundry Creditors. Balance sheet balances at Rs 11,72,850.

bug_1_truck_calculation.description: Truck gross calculation used final_w/100 but entry creation uses (qntl - bag/100)
bug_1_truck_calculation.root_cause: Formula mismatch between entry creation (main.js line 272: qntl - bag/100) and balance sheet calculation (used final_w/100)
bug_1_truck_calculation.fix_applied: Changed to use (qntl - bag/100) * rate in fy_summary.py line 431 and fy_summary.js line 295

bug_2_diesel_orphan_pumps.description: Diesel accounts not showing when diesel_pumps collection is empty but diesel_accounts has entries
bug_2_diesel_orphan_pumps.root_cause: Only iterated over diesel_pumps collection, missing orphaned entries
bug_2_diesel_orphan_pumps.fix_applied: Added orphan pump handling (lines 223-240 in fy_summary.py) to include diesel entries with pump_id not in diesel_pumps
bug_2_diesel_orphan_pumps.verification: Lokesh Fuels appears in Sundry Creditors with 4,400.00

bug_3_cutting_rate_zero.description: cutting_rate=0 treated as falsy in entries.js, defaulting to 5
bug_3_cutting_rate_zero.root_cause: JavaScript || operator treats 0 as falsy (cutting_rate || 5 becomes 5 when cutting_rate=0)
bug_3_cutting_rate_zero.fix_applied: Changed to nullish check: cutting_rate != null ? cutting_rate : 5
bug_3_cutting_rate_zero.verification: Gokul: total=4000 (correct), not 4100 (buggy). Barsana: total=4200 (correct as control)
